source_authority_context.summary: The request is outside the authority-bearing execution boundary and does not carry a previously valid execution-time authority condition.

execution_context.summary: The request is outside the authority-drift execution scope and remains a non-authority path.

authority_drift.summary: Authority drift is not applicable because the request is outside the execution-time authority boundary.
limitations: This preview does not convert a non-authority request into an authority grant.
This preview does not block execution or emit gate semantics.
This preview remains fixture-backed and explanation-only.
